manual_label.my_reasoning: Even though the 90 day buy box reaches a a low  a 39$ this is not an accurate represntation of the buy box. THe buy box is relatively stable at 63.96-68.99, and with around 18 competitive sellers at the buy box, I would expect the buy box to remain stable. Additionally, the product has a good sales rank and a good profit margin, so I would be comfortable buying this product.
manual_label.gate_missed: The gate misread that the 90 day buy box drop was a common factor and not a one time thing. From the Sales data, you can see that it dropped low one time, and then recovered, so It is still a good buy.
